title: onobrychis schahuensis
intro: Onobrychis schahuensis, also known as Schahua sainfoin, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Onobrychis schahuensis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some traditional remedies also using the roots and leaves for medicinal purposes.
